description_long: This is a compact countertop microwave oven with a rectangular form and rounded edges, primarily finished in a light gray or white color. The front features a large, transparent window set in the door, allowing visibility into the interior, and a prominent horizontal handle above the window for easy opening. To the right of the door, there is a vertical control panel with three rotary dials, each with clear markings, and a small red indicator button or light at the bottom. The sides of the microwave have a grid of small rectangular ventilation slots, while the back is mostly solid with minimal detailing. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A compact, light-colored microwave oven with a large front window, horizontal handle, and a side control panel featuring three rotary dials. Ventilation slots are present on both sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent door window, horizontal handle, and the vertical control panel with three dials and a red indicator.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the grid of ventilation slots and the protruding handle at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid back panel with minimal detailing and a subtle geometric pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view with a similar grid of ventilation slots and the handle visible at the back edge.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring three large rotary dials stacked one above the other, each with clear markings. At the bottom of the panel is a small red indicator button or light. No digital display or touchpads are visible.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a thick, horizontal bar located above the window on the front door, extending nearly the full width of the door. It appears to be made of plastic or coated metal, with a slightly curved ergonomic design for easy gripping.
attribute_vent_placement: Ventilation slots are present on both the left and right side panels, arranged in a grid pattern. No vents are visible on the front or rear surfaces.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular transparent window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing clear visibility into the interior.
